properties.entry: insert ignore into time_dim(time) ( select distinct time_to_sec(time(t1.poll_time)) from tplink_deco_client_device_wlan_stg t1 left join time_dim td on time_to_sec(time(t1.poll_time))=td.time where td.time_key is null )

insert ignore into time_dim(time) ( select distinct time_to_sec(date_format(time(t1.poll_time),'%H:00:00')) from tplink_deco_client_device_wlan_stg t1 left join time_dim td on time_to_sec(date_format(time(t1.poll_time),'%H:00:00'))=td.time where td.time_key is null )
select * from tplink_deco_client_device_wlan_stg order by id -- order id to get increasing time (id is primary key and indexed, ordered, but we want it more explicit)
insert into tmp_gw_device_dim_normalize values(?,?)
drop table tmp_gw_device_dim_normalize;

insert ignore into gw_iface_dim(iface_mac,iface_name) ( select distinct t1.router_mac, t1.wlan_name from tmp_gw_device_dim_normalize t1 left join gw_iface_dim t2 on t1.router_mac=t2.iface_mac and t1.wlan_name=t2.iface_name where t2.iface_key is null );
insert into tmp_device_dim_normalize values(?,?,?)
drop table tmp_device_dim_normalize;

insert ignore into network_statistics.device_dim(device_mac,device_name,device_iface_wifi) ( select distinct t1.client_mac, t1.client_name, t1.client_type from tmp_device_dim_normalize t1 left join device_dim t2 on t1.client_mac=t2.device_mac and t1.client_name=t2.device_name and t1.client_type=t2.device_iface_wifi where t2.device_key is null );
insert into tmp_ip_dim_normalize values(?)
drop table tmp_ip_dim_normalize;
insert ignore into network_statistics.ip_dim(ipv4) ( select distinct t1.ipv4 from tmp_ip_dim_normalize t1 left join ip_dim t2 on t1.ipv4 = t2.ipv4 where t2.ip_key is null );

create temporary table tmp_device_wlan_connections_fact ( `date_connect` date, -- `time_connect` int, -- `device_name` varchar(255), -- `device_mac` bigint, -- `device_type` int, -- `device_ipv4` int, -- `router_mac` bigint, -- `wlan_name` varchar(255), -- `connect_status` int -- )
insert into tmp_device_wlan_connections_fact values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)
drop table tmp_device_wlan_connections_fact

insert ignore into device_wlan_connections_fact ( select
dd.date_key, td.time_key, dd1.device_key, id.ip_key, ad.ap_key, gid.iface_key, ifnull(vd.vendor_key,-2147483648), ifnull(vd1.vendor_key,-2147483648), aidi.connect_status, CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(dd.date, '%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(SEC_TO_TIME(td.time), '%H%i%s') ) as event_timestamp
from tmp_device_wlan_connections_fact aidi
join date_dim dd on dd.date_key=( select date_key from date_dim where aidi.date_connect=date ) join time_dim td on td.time_key=( select time_key from time_dim where aidi.time_connect=time ) join device_dim dd1 on dd1.device_key=( select device_key from device_dim where aidi.device_type=device_iface_wifi and aidi.device_mac=device_mac and aidi.device_name=device_name ) join ip_dim id on id.ip_key=( select ip_key from ip_dim where aidi.device_ipv4=ipv4 ) join ap_dim ad on ad.ap_key=( select ap_key from ap_dim where ap_key=-2147483648 ) join gw_iface_dim gid on gid.iface_key=( select iface_key from gw_iface_dim where aidi.router_mac=iface_mac and aidi.wlan_name=iface_name and iface_phy_name is null ) left join vendor_dim vd on vd.vendor_key=( select vendor_key from vendor_dim where aidi.device_mac>>24=vendor_prefix ) left join vendor_dim vd1 on vd1.vendor_key=( select vendor_key from vendor_dim where aidi.router_mac>>24=vendor_prefix ) )
create temporary table tmp_device_traffic_by_hour_fact ( `date` date, `time` int, `device_mac` bigint, `device_name` varchar(255), `device_type` int, `transmission_bytes_val` bigint )
insert into tmp_device_traffic_by_hour_fact values (?,?,?,?,?,?)
drop table tmp_device_traffic_by_hour_fact

insert into network_statistics.device_traffic_by_hour_fact(date_key,time_key,device_key,transmission_bytes) ( select
dd.date_key, td.time_key, dd1.device_key, aidi.transmission_bytes_val
from tmp_device_traffic_by_hour_fact aidi
join date_dim dd on dd.date_key=( select date_key from date_dim where aidi.date=date ) join time_dim td on td.time_key=( select time_key from time_dim where aidi.time=time ) join device_dim dd1 on dd1.device_key=( select device_key from device_dim where aidi.device_type=device_iface_wifi and aidi.device_mac=device_mac and aidi.device_name=device_name ) ) on duplicate key update transmission_bytes=transmission_bytes+transmission_bytes_val
insert into tplink_deco_client_device_wlan_archive(poll_time, raw_data) select poll_time, raw_data from tplink_deco_client_device_wlan_stg
drop table tplink_deco_client_device_wlan_stg
create table if not exists tplink_deco_client_device_wlan_stg like tplink_deco_client_device_wlan_stg_ingest

rename table tplink_deco_client_device_wlan_stg to tmp_tplink_deco_client_device_wlan_stg, tplink_deco_client_device_wlan_stg_ingest to tplink_deco_client_device_wlan_stg, tmp_tplink_deco_client_device_wlan_stg to tplink_deco_client_device_wlan_stg_ingest
